hero.headline: Vision-driven product designer
hero.subline: NYC-based / 0->1 Specialist / Mobile-first / Shipping with AI

philosophy.intro: the first step is always to

steps.label: absorb
steps.description: Before designing anything, I immerse myself in the problem space — users, constraints, and the culture around the product.

steps.label: understand
steps.description: I map what I've absorbed into a clear picture of what matters, what's at stake, and where opportunity lives.

steps.label: collaborate
steps.description: Great design is a team sport. I bring people in early and keep them close — engineers, PMs, founders, and users.

steps.label: share
steps.description: I believe design only works when it spreads. I document, present, and evangelize so the team moves together.
